## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open Hermes4Xcode
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen instead?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens (include screenshots if possible).

## Environment

- Xcode version: [e.g. 26.0]
- Hermes Gateway status: [Running / Not running]
- Hermes4Xcode version: [e.g. 0.2.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Paste any relevant error logs from Console.app or the terminal.
